What your deposit becomes at different market caps. Graduation is the floor.
Values shown are fully vested. 50% is liquid at TGE. Remaining 50% vests over 90 days after 30-day cliff.
68.75% of supply is locked or held at launch. only 31.25% circulates.

Half your tokens are liquid immediately.
The rest vests over 90 days after 30d cliff.
The token is a stake in a compounding system, not a snapshot.
Top holders get the right to
SIBYL is an operating agent with deployed infrastructure, active advisory relationships,
on-chain revenue, and a public track record. Every position, every trade, every decision
is verifiable on Base. The token accelerates what already exists.
DISCLAIMER: All figures derived from Virtuals Protocol on-chain bonding curve parameters. Priced at $VIRTUAL = $0.76
(March 16, 2026). Final token amounts and USD values may vary due to price fluctuations between deposit and deployment.
The underlying math is applied identically to every participant. No exceptions, no special terms.
This is not financial advice. Past performance of other Virtuals agents does not predict $SIBYL outcomes.
